Rules.InvariantScript:
ClearCollect(
    colUsers,
    RenameColumns(
        ShowColumns(
            Filter(
                Employees,
                Status = "Active" && Branches = "Ennis" && Machinist = true
            ),
            ADPEmpNumber,
            'First Name',
            'Last Name',
            'Full Name',
            Branches
        ),
        field_0,
        EmpID,
        field_2,
        'First Name',
        field_4,
        'Last Name',
        Title,
        'Full Name',
        field_22,
        Branch
    )
);
Set(signIN,true);
